final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing sci-fi space illustration of an astronaut floating in Earth orbit (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a cinematic sci-fi epic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include astronaut as central subject, space station structure partially visible at frame edges, galaxy and nebula filling the background
Subject: must include a single astronaut in detailed spacesuit floating in Earth orbit
Scene/backdrop: must include Earth below/behind, a brilliant Milky Way and nebula in deep space background, partial space station structure at the image edges
Lighting/mood: must be lit primarily by Earth's reflected light (earthshine); needs a grand, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source balance is yours
Color palette: needs a deep-space direction with vivid nebula hues contrasting against the darkness — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs high-detail spacesuit surface treatment — exact material rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; spacesuit details must be clearly rendered; Earth's reflected glow must be the dominant light source on the astronaut
Avoid:
